summary: Full backend + frontend testing of NxGenSports iteration 2. New features: rate limiting, forgot/reset password flow, file upload, email invites via Resend, ResetPassword page. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All 28+ pages load correctly. Fixed critical bug: ResetPassword page was inaccessible to unauthenticated users (redirected to Login). Fixed in App.jsx (public route) and apiClient.js (skip redirect on /ResetPassword).

issues: Multiple 403 errors in console when super_admin navigates pages — expected behavior since super_admin has no team_id. Consider suppressing console errors for super_admin context or handling gracefully.

critical_code_review_comments: ResetPassword page was not accessible without auth — FIXED: added public Route in App.jsx and exclusion in apiClient.js 401 redirect
Email delivery via Resend may fail if nxgen-sports.com domain is not verified in Resend dashboard (non-critical, API calls succeed)
seed_data_creation: Rate limit test used random test emails — no persistent seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2: All backend tests pass (auth, CRUD, invite flow, rate limiting, forgot/reset password, file upload). All 28 pages load. ResetPassword public route bug was fixed (App.jsx + apiClient.js). Forgot password form shows on Login page. Rate limiting: 5 failed attempts → 429 on 6th. Email delivery via Resend is non-critical (domain verification required). 403 errors in console are expected for super_admin (no team_id).
rca_of_fixed_bug: ResetPassword page at /ResetPassword?token=xxx was inaccessible to unauthenticated users. Root cause: All routes wrapped in AuthenticatedApp which checks auth via GET /api/auth/me. On 401, apiClient.js calls window.location.href='/Login'. Fix: (1) Added public <Route path='/ResetPassword'> outside AuthenticatedApp in App.jsx. (2) Added /ResetPassword to the 401-redirect exclusion list in apiClient.js.
